title: Fistularia serotina
intro: Fistularia serotina, also known as the ocean stringfish, is a species of marine fish that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Fistularia serotina include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and preventing infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include bioactive peptides, glycoproteins, and other molecules that exhibit immunomodulatory and antioxidant activities. The most common herbal preparations made with Fistularia serotina include capsules, powders, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and overall health in traditional medicine.
taxonomy: Fistularia serotina is classified within the family Fistulariidae, which is a group of marine anglerfish. This family is further grouped under the order Lophiiformes, a larger order that includes various species of anglerfish.
